# BiciRadar

> Official public landing content for BiciRadar.

## Canonical site
- https://gcaguilar.github.io/biciradar/

## Key pages
- Home: https://gcaguilar.github.io/biciradar/
- BiciRadar as official-app complement:
  https://gcaguilar.github.io/biciradar/biciradar-complemento-app-oficial/

## Scope
- Public product messaging and feature overview.
- Public FAQ-style content for end users.

## Source of truth
- https://github.com/gcaguilar/biciradar
